channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 30%.

item.title: The Guardian: Wes Streeting - The Guardian
i Politics: Burnham's income tax pledge if he becomes PM
item.description: Burnham's income tax pledge if he becomes PM

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Burnham says politics ‘needs new script’ and vows to change Labour if elected as Makerfield MP – UK politics live
item.description: Burnham says politics ‘needs new script’ and vows to change Labour if elected as Makerfield MP – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Andy Burnham does little to hide his true ambitions with a by-election launch promising ‘change’
item.description: Andy Burnham does little to hide his true ambitions with a by-election launch promising ‘change’

item.title: BBC Politics: UK net migration needs to fall further, says Andy Burnham
item.description: UK net migration needs to fall further, says Andy Burnham

item.title: The Guardian: Burnham starts byelection campaign with thinly veiled pitch for No 10 - The Guardian
item.description: Burnham starts byelection campaign with thinly veiled pitch for No 10 - The Guardian

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Burnham starts byelection campaign with thinly veiled pitch for No 10
item.description: Burnham starts byelection campaign with thinly veiled pitch for No 10

item.title: i Politics: Burnham's fight for No 10 could be in jeopardy - and it's down to one issue

item.title: BBC Politics: Ministers want new voting system in place for possible Manchester mayor race
item.description: Ministers want new voting system in place for possible Manchester mayor race

item.title: FT UK Politics: Andy Burnham says land in the UK is ‘undertaxed’
item.description: Andy Burnham says land in the UK is ‘undertaxed’
